durationMinutes.title: Duration Minutes
durationMinutes.description: Duration of the showing in minutes. Defaults to 30 if not provided.

eventDescription.title: Event Description
eventDescription.description: Optional description or notes for the showing event

propertyId.title: Property Id
propertyId.description: The Salesforce record ID of the Property__c record, resolved from a property lookup

startDateTime.title: Start Date Time
startDateTime.description: The date and time when the property showing should begin. Must be in the future.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: Custom subject line for the event. Defaults to Property Showing if not provided.
